title: Bandung
description: Balai Besar POM di Bandung is a regulatory body focused on the supervision of food and drugs in Indonesia. They provide various services including certification for good distribution practices, food production, and testing of food and drugs. Their intended clients include manufacturers, importers, and the general public seeking information and assistance regarding food and drug safety.
